name: Meat Loaf Pizza Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the top and bottom of a clay pot in water for at least 15 minutes.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine bread crumbs, milk, chicken, egg whites, onions, bell peppers, parmesan cheese, salt, oregano, pizza seasoning, and black pepper.
3. Press the mixture into the pot.
4. Cover and place in a cold oven.
5. Set the temperature to 400°F (200°C).
6. Bake for 1 hour.
7. Spread pizza sauce on top of the meat loaf.
8. Top with shredded mozzarella cheese and sliced mushrooms.
9. Cover and return to the oven; bake an additional 10 minutes.
